claimText: Ranjit Sagar Dam, also known as Thein Dam, is located on the Ravi River near the Punjab-Jammu and Kashmir border.
evidenceExcerpt: Ranjit Sagar Dam (Thein Dam) is located on the Ravi River near the Punjab-Jammu & Kashmir border.
examUse: Match the following pairs of dams and their respective rivers or states.
distractorHooks: Beas or Sutlej river instead of Ravi
Himachal Pradesh instead of Punjab-J&K border

claimText: The Etalin hydroelectric project is situated on the Dri and Tangon rivers in the Dibang Valley of Arunachal Pradesh.
evidenceExcerpt: Etalin hydroelectric project is situated in the Dibang Valley, Arunachal Pradesh, on the Dri and Tangon rivers.
examUse: Correct-pair questions matching hydroelectric projects to their rivers or states.
distractorHooks: Subansiri or Lohit rivers instead of Dri and Tangon
Sikkim or Assam instead of Arunachal Pradesh

claimText: The Kaleshwaram Lift Irrigation Project in Telangana is the world's largest multi-stage lift irrigation project and is built on the Godavari River.
evidenceExcerpt: Kaleshwaram Lift Irrigation Project (KLIP) in Telangana is the world's largest multi-stage lift irrigation project, built on the Godavari River.
examUse: Statement-based questions on irrigation projects, their rivers, and global status.
distractorHooks: Krishna or Cauvery river instead of Godavari

claimText: The new Pamban Bridge in Tamil Nadu connects Rameswaram Island to mainland India, replacing a decommissioned cantilever bridge.
evidenceExcerpt: The new Pamban Bridge in Tamil Nadu replaces the original 2022-decommissioned cantilever bridge connecting Rameswaram Island to the mainland.
examUse: Statement-based questions regarding the geographical connection and type of bridge replaced.
distractorHooks: Replaces a suspension bridge instead of a cantilever bridge
